description: 7 GTM engineering automation workflows — TypeScript CLI toolkit based on Cody Schneider masterclass

features.name: Workspace scaffold — package.json, .env.example, ApiClients loader, shared logger, npm scripts
LinkedIn Giveaway Auto-Responder — scrape commenters, filter keyword, DM Notion URL, resume-safe
Bulk Facebook Ad Generator — Perplexity variations + React→PNG + localhost:3210 preview UI + zip download
Podcast Cold Email Pipeline — Rafonic scrape → MillionVerifier validate → Instantly enroll, resume-safe
On-the-Fly Railway Postgres Analysis — provision → ingest → Claude SQL → results → auto-teardown
Facebook Ad Performance Optimizer Daemon — poll metrics → pause losers → clone top-N into scaled adset
LinkedIn ICP Crawler + Auto Email — PhantomBuster scrape → Rafonic enrich → Claude personalize → Instantly enroll
